content:
IVX ENTERPRISE OWNER PLATFORM â€“ FINAL QA & CERTIFICATION

Objective:
Perform a complete production QA of the Enterprise Owner Platform. Do not assume anything works because code exists. Every feature must be executed, verified, and backed by evidence.

==================================================
1. OWNER LOGIN
==================================================

Verify:

âś“ Manual email/password login
âś“ Logout
âś“ Session restore
âś“ Session expiration
âś“ Password reset
âś“ Owner recovery
âś“ No automatic login
âś“ Android
âś“ iOS
âś“ Web

Return:
PASS/FAIL for every item.

==================================================
2. ROLE-BASED ACCESS CONTROL (RBAC)
==================================================

Test every role:

Owner
Admin
IVX Staff
Member
Investor
Buyer
Realtor
Broker
Influencer
JV Partner
Tokenized Investor
Auditor
Guest

For each role verify:

âś“ Dashboard access
âś“ Menu visibility
âś“ API authorization
âś“ CRUD permissions
âś“ Finance permissions
âś“ Chat permissions
âś“ AI permissions
âś“ Recovery permissions

Attempt unauthorized access and verify HTTP 401/403.

==================================================
3. OWNER ACCESS CONTROL
==================================================

Verify Owner can:

âś“ Create users
âś“ Disable users
âś“ Suspend users
âś“ Delete users
âś“ Assign roles
âś“ Remove roles
âś“ Grant screen access
âś“ Revoke screen access
âś“ Grant module access
âś“ Revoke module access

Changes must take effect immediately and persist after logout/login.

==================================================
4. SCREEN-BY-SCREEN QA
==================================================

Verify every Owner/Admin screen:

Dashboard
Members
Investors
Buyers
Realtors
Brokers
Influencers
JV Deals
Tokenized
Properties
Wallet
Treasury
Transactions
Revenue
Analytics
Marketing
Landing Control
Media
Notifications
Chat
IVX IA
Developer Workspace
Variables
Recovery Center
Settings

For every screen verify:

âś“ Opens successfully
âś“ Loads live data
âś“ Create/Edit/Delete works
âś“ Permissions enforced
âś“ No console errors
âś“ No crashes

==================================================
5. API QA
==================================================

Test every production endpoint.

Verify:

âś“ HTTP 200
âś“ HTTP 401
âś“ HTTP 403
âś“ Validation
âś“ Rate limiting
âś“ JWT verification
âś“ Owner verification

==================================================
6. DATA QA
==================================================

Verify:

Members
Profiles
Investors
Buyers
Realtors
Brokers
Influencers
JV Deals
Wallets
Transactions
Treasury
Revenue
Analytics
Messages
Notifications

Check:

âś“ No duplicates
âś“ No orphan records
âś“ Foreign keys intact
âś“ Counts match UI

==================================================
7. MOBILE QA
==================================================

Android

iOS

Web

Verify:

âś“ Navigation
âś“ Chat
âś“ AI
âś“ Notifications
âś“ Uploads
âś“ Camera
âś“ Video
âś“ PDF
âś“ Recovery
âś“ Variables
âś“ Owner controls

==================================================
8. PERFORMANCE
==================================================

Measure:

Login time
Dashboard load
API latency
Memory usage
Crash count
Network failures

==================================================
9. SECURITY
==================================================

Verify:

âś“ No privilege escalation
âś“ No frontend-only security
âś“ Owner-only routes protected
âś“ JWT validation
âś“ Session persistence
âś“ Audit logs
âś“ Secret masking

==================================================
10. FINAL CERTIFICATION
==================================================

Return ONLY:

Overall Completion %
Modules Tested
Modules Passed
Modules Failed
APIs Tested
Screens Tested
Roles Tested
GitHub SHA
Render Deploy ID
Production URL
Health Status
Critical Bugs Remaining
Medium Bugs
Low Bugs

FINAL STATUS:

CERTIFIED
or
NOT CERTIFIED

Every failure must include:
- Exact file
- Function
- Route
- Root cause
- Fix applied
- Commit SHA
- Live verification

Do not provide narrative. Execute the QA, fix issues found, redeploy, retest, and return evidence only.
